title: Pan-Seared Cod Tacos
description: A simple and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring pan-seared cod, served in a crispy taco shell with fresh cilantro and a squeeze of lime.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the cod fillets with salt, pepper, and garlic.
3. Add olive oil to the skillet and sear the cod for 3-4 minutes per side.
4. Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
5. Warm the tacos shells according to package instructions.
6. Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of cod in each shell.
7. Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top of the cod.
8. Drizzle lime juice over the cilantro.
9. Add sliced jalapeño on top for added flavor.
